FBE-REMOVED_ROAD_SIGN.description:
At the start of the next [blue]{Combats}[/blue] combats, gain [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Vulnerable[/gold].
(Equivalent to 2 turns of [gold]Vulnerable[/gold].)
FBE-REMOVED_ROAD_SIGN.title: Uprooted Road Sign
FBE-SWORD_OF_STONE_MK2.title: Sword of Stone Mk II
FBE-SWORD_OF_STONE_MK2.description: After losing [red]{HealthToLose}[/red] HP, Transform this into a powerful [gold]Relic[/gold].
FBE-SWORD_OF_STONE_MK2.flavor: [red]This is the Sword of Stone Mk II...[/red]
FBE-INSIGHT.title: Insight
FBE-INSIGHT.description: Upon pickup, view [blue]{RewardCount}[/blue] cards from a [gold]random character[/gold]. Add any number of them to your [gold]Deck[/gold].
FBE-INSIGHT.flavor: [red]This power does not belong to you...[/red]
FBE-INSIGHT.selectionScreenPrompt: Choose any number of cards to add to your Deck
FBE-REDEMPTION.title: Redemption
FBE-REDEMPTION.description: After defeating a Boss enemy, heal [blue]{Heal}[/blue] HP.
FBE-TOP_HAT.title: Top Hat
FBE-TOP_HAT.description: Card rewards contain an additional [gold]Bomb[/gold]. [gold]Bomb[/gold] costs [blue]0[/blue].
FBE-STARTER_DECK.title: Starter Deck
FBE-STARTER_DECK.description: Upon pickup, choose [blue]3[/blue] of [blue]6[/blue] unique card bundles to add to your [gold]Deck[/gold].
FBE-STARTER_DECK.previewAddPrompt: Confirm to select this card bundle
FBE-STARTER_DECK.previewRemovePrompt: Confirm to remove this card bundle
